description: baseline: faithful Python port of validateEInvoice() from A1-Localization-AM@src/einvoice.js. 16 distinct error codes (MISSING_TRANSACTION_TYPE, MISSING_NUMBER, MISSING_ISSUE_DATE, INVALID_ISSUE_DATE, MISSING_SUPPLIER_NAME, MISSING_SUPPLIER_HVHH, INVALID_SUPPLIER_HVHH, MISSING_BUYER_ID, INVALID_BUYER_HVHH, NO_LINES, INVALID_LINE_DESCRIPTION, INVALID_LINE_QUANTITY, INVALID_LINE_NET, INVALID_LINE_VAT_RATE, INVALID_LINE_VAT_AMOUNT, LINE_VAT_MISMATCH). 20 cases cover 4 valid (multi-line, zero-rate, excise+env-fee, passport buyer) + 16 single-error (one per code). 100% on first run after fixing HHVH all-same-digit rejection in test data.
